finding: oauth_mock.rs / ldap_mock.rs / apple_mock.rs + apple_test_key.p8 moved BYTE-FOR-BYTE via `git mv` (git records them as renames, 0 changed lines/bytes). sync_probe.rs has exactly ONE changed line (the `open` signature — T-1). No other fixture source edited.

VERIFIED GENERIC → moved. sync_probe decodes each `sync` SSE frame as raw serde_json::Value and lifts entity/action/id as bare Strings (L77-90); it names NO app-side SyncEntity/wire type. Its sole coupling was `&crate::common::TestServer` (subscribe URL) → abstracted behind a new dep-free `crate::ApiUrlTarget` trait (`fn api_url(&self, path:&str)->String`). `open<S: ApiUrlTarget>(server:&S, token:&str)`. Behaviour-preserving.

cargo check -p ziee = 0 (2 pre-existing unrelated warnings, mcp/repository.rs). cargo check -p ziee-desktop = 0. cd sdk && cargo check --workspace = 0 (default features). cargo check -p ziee-test-harness --features fixtures = 0 (testcontainers/wiremock/rsa/jsonwebtoken all resolve).

cargo test --test integration_tests --no-run = 0 → the re-export shims in tests/common/mod.rs (`pub mod oauth_mock { pub use ziee_test_harness::fixtures::oauth_mock::*; }` ×4) resolve every historical call site (crate::common::oauth_mock::OAuthMockServer, crate::common::sync_probe::SyncProbe::open, apple_mock::AppleMockServer, ldap_mock) UNCHANGED across tests/auth/* and tests/{user,llm_provider}/sync_emit_test.rs.

Auth/sync tests that USE the moved mocks all PASS through the shim: sync:: = 17 passed/0 failed (sync_probe, generic path); auth::oauth + auth::ldap = 28 passed/0 failed (testcontainers, docker OK on this box); auth::apple = 9 passed/0 failed (wiremock apple_mock). 54 total, 0 failures. Harness spawned the real ziee binary via a symlink src-app/target/debug/ziee → the private CARGO_TARGET_DIR bin (harness walk-up doesn't honour CARGO_TARGET_DIR; task-sanctioned).

These are external-endpoint AUTH mocks — reviewed for trust posture. (a) apple_mock generates a fresh RSA-2048 keypair per process + signs id_tokens with a TEST kid; the committed apple_test_key.p8 is an explicitly-throwaway P-256 EC key (comment: 'not a real Apple key — only valid for signing tests locally'), so relocating it into the SDK leaks no secret. (b) oauth_mock/ldap_mock bind loopback docker containers with no persisted creds. (c) No fixture reaches production code paths (test-only, dev-dep, feature-gated). (d) The move does NOT widen any trust boundary: the mocks were already app-neutral; a second app enabling `features=["fixtures"]` gets the same loopback-only mocks. No `ziee::`/secret/DATABASE_URL reference in any moved file.

apple_mock::fixture_p8_path() uses env!("CARGO_MANIFEST_DIR")/tests/fixtures/apple_test_key.p8. Post-move CARGO_MANIFEST_DIR = the harness crate → the .p8 MUST live at sdk/crates/ziee-test-harness/tests/fixtures/ (git mv'd there). This is the ONE legitimate manifest-relative ref (fixture file travels WITH fixture code → self-consistent for every consumer), opposite the harness spawn-engine's 'never use CARGO_MANIFEST_DIR' rule (which needs repo-root-relative paths). Proven correct by auth::apple's test_apple_test_connection_succeeds_for_valid_config (loads the .p8) passing. tests/fixtures/*.p8 is a non-.rs file → cargo does NOT treat it as a test target.

The 7 fixture deps are OPTIONAL + gated behind `fixtures`, so the harness default build stays lean/build-DB-free (its stated posture). Versions/features mirror the ziee server catalog (testcontainers 0.27.3, wiremock 0.6, jsonwebtoken 10.1.0 rust_crypto, rsa 0.9 pem, base64 0.22, tokio-stream 0.1, serde_json 1) → single Cargo.lock unifies, no duplicate build. fixtures also enables reqwest/stream (bytes_stream) + tokio/macros (fixtures' #[cfg(test)] self-tests). Only the ziee server dev-dep opts in; desktop keeps the bare harness.

The desktop integration_tests binary shares `#[path="../../../server/tests/common/harness_inner.rs"] mod common;` — it uses harness_inner.rs directly, NOT mod.rs, and references NONE of the 4 fixtures (grep across src-app/desktop for OAuthMockServer/LdapMock/AppleMock/SyncProbe = empty). So the re-export shims + ApiUrlTarget impl (in mod.rs) are server-only; desktop is untouched and its harness dep stays feature-less. cargo check -p ziee-desktop = 0 confirms.

Test-only move: no handler/route/model/OpenAPI-annotated type touched → OpenAPI spec + generated types.ts unaffected by construction. The only non-test file edited is src-app/server/Cargo.toml (a dev-dep feature flag) + tests/common/mod.rs (test glue). Golden untouched — no regen needed.

sdk is a git SUBMODULE (ziee-ai/sdk, gitlink mode 160000). The initial `git mv` crossed the boundary and corrupted the superproject index (staged D sdk + renames into the submodule); unwound via `git reset HEAD .`. Correct protocol followed: fixture files committed INSIDE the sdk repo (detached HEAD, matching the prior ziee-sandbox chunk); the ziee superproject stages the src-app deletions + Cargo/mod edits + the bumped sdk gitlink. NOT pushed. vendor/pgvector NOT staged.
